recovery.recovery_action: Reissue implementation to dev for actual tusq approve implementation, or manually recover state back to implementation and dispatch dev with explicit acceptance criteria.
recovery.detail: M18 run run_0edfdeabceba9227 was intended to implement tusq approve. Dev turn turn_a5065a7de3a598fd accepted without modifying src/cli.js, tests, package scripts, or docs for tusq approve; it only appended a verification note for M1-M17 and incorrectly marked implementation_complete passed. Do not proceed to QA/ship approval until dev implements the M18 approval workflow or the framework reissues dev with the charter enforced.

escalation.recovery_action: Reissue implementation to dev for actual tusq approve implementation, or manually recover state back to implementation and dispatch dev with explicit acceptance criteria.

provenance.trigger_reason: Implement the next tusq.dev increment from VISION.md and existing M12 V2 planning: replace manual manifest approval edits with a governed repo-local tusq approve workflow. Add a CLI command that approves selected capabilities in tusq.manifest.json, records approved_by and approved_at, supports list/dry-run/json behavior where appropriate, and preserves existing review/compile boundaries. This is new product work beyond M17; do not treat existing M1-M17 artifacts as sufficient.
